eligibility: Farmers in rainfed and climate-vulnerable areas

money_benefits.subsidy: Financial assistance for sustainable agriculture practices, water conservation, integrated farming systems, agroforestry, soil health management, and climate-resilient technologies.
money_benefits.micro_irrigation_support: Assistance for efficient water-use technologies under related NMSA components.
money_benefits.soil_health_support: Support for soil testing, nutrient management, and soil health improvement activities.

documents_required: Land Ownership Record / Khasra Copy / Land Documents
application_process: Visit the nearest Agriculture Department office or Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK).
Obtain the NMSA application form for the relevant component.
Fill in farmer, land, and bank details.
Submit the application to the Agriculture Officer.
Verification of eligibility and land details is conducted.
Approval is granted based on scheme targets and availability of funds.
Benefits/subsidies are released to the beneficiary as per scheme guidelines.
benefits: Enhances agricultural productivity in rainfed areas
Promotes agroforestry and sustainable farming practices
Improves farmer income and livelihood security
scheme_details.implemented_by: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India
